LIME.name: Calcium Carbonate (Lime)
LIME.description: Raises pH in acidic soil. Provides calcium.

DOLOMITE.name: Dolomitic Lime (Ca+Mg)
DOLOMITE.description: Raises pH and adds magnesium. Slower than lime but provides more nutrients.

SULFUR.name: Elemental Sulfur
SULFUR.description: Lowers pH in alkaline soil. Takes time to work.

IRON_CHELATE.name: Iron Chelate
IRON_CHELATE.description: Treats iron deficiency from high pH. Slightly lowers pH.
